name: @inavi-maps/mcp-server
description: MCP Server for iNavi Maps - API Specifications and Map Visualization Templates for AI Assistants

tools.name: list_api_specs
tools.description: Browse available iNavi Maps API specifications by category

tools.name: get_api_spec
tools.description: Get detailed specification of a specific API by operationId

tools.name: list_map_examples
tools.description: Browse available map visualization HTML examples

tools.name: get_map_example
tools.description: Get specific map example HTML template by ID
